mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO "TB_NOTIFICATION" ( "MEMBER_NUM", "NOTIFICATION_CONTENTS", "NOTIFICATION_URL", "CREATE_DATE" )
VALUES ( #{memberNum}, #{notificationContents}, #{notificationUrl}, NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select:
SELECT "NOTIFICATION_NUM", "MEMBER_NUM", "NOTIFICATION_CONTENTS", "NOTIFICATION_URL", "IS_READ", "CREATE_DATE"
FROM "TB_NOTIFICATION"
WHERE "MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum}
ORDER BY "NOTIFICATION_NUM" DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM "TB_NOTIFICATION"
WHERE "MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum} AND "IS_READ" = FALSE

SELECT "NOTIFICATION_NUM", "MEMBER_NUM", "NOTIFICATION_CONTENTS", "NOTIFICATION_URL", "IS_READ", "CREATE_DATE"
FROM "TB_NOTIFICATION"
WHERE "MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum}
ORDER BY "NOTIFICATION_NUM" DESC
LIMIT 5
